basic_details.job_title: Siwan District Court Temporary Attender Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Siwan District Court Temporary Attender Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Siwan District Court. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the Siwan District Court Temporary Attender Recruitment 2026 for the post of Temporary Attender.

selection_process: Departmental Rules as per Appointment Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Siwan District Court Temporary Attender Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://siwan.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Siwan District Court Temporary Attender Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Siwan District Court Temporary Attender posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Temporary Attender positions at Siwan District Court is 21st June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Temporary Attender role?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Temporary Attender post is 18 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion as of the specified date mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification needed for this recruitment?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Temporary Attender position, candidates must have passed the 12th grade (12th Pass) from a recognized board or institution.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Temporary Attender post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Temporary Attender post announced by the Siwan District Court.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Siwan District Court Temporary Attender recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Temporary Attender posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Temporary Attender recruitment at Siwan District Court.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Temporary Attender position?
faq.answer: The Temporary Attender positions are contractual in nature, meaning they are offered on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Attender role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Temporary Attender post will be as per the Minimum Wage applicable in the region. Specific details might be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. How will candidates be selected for the Temporary Attender posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on the Departmental Rules as per the Appointment Committee of the Siwan District Court. Further details will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Siwan District Court, which is https://siwan.dcourts.gov.in.
